name: agenc-store-templates
description: Deploy-your-own AgenC agent store: config-first Next.js templates + the shared store-core package (PLAN_2 Part C).
comment:overrides: @tetsuo-ai/marketplace-sdk and -react resolve from the npm registry (sdk 0.6.1 / react 0.2.0 published 2026-07-01) — never from local tarballs. The remaining overrides only dedupe the React type packages across the Next 15 templates.
author: Tetsuo AI
